TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Gowryu ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 53 buwan, 156 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 52% kyan ku 81 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 48% kyan ku 75 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 47%, Amis 3%, Paywan 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Gowryu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Gowryu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Gowryu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Gowryu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Gowryu hya' ga Pololan. tay 'llaw na Gowryu hya' ga Mkslaq. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ɣowrju ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ɣowrju ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ɣowrju ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ɣowrju ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ɣowrju ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ɣowrju ħjaʔ ɣa pololan. taj ʔllaw na ɣowrju ħjaʔ ɣa mks~ɕlaq. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Gowryu ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 53 buwan, 156 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 52% kyan ku 81 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 48% kyan ku 75 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 47%, Amis 3%, Paywan 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Gowryu hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Gowryu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Gowryu hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Gowryu hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Gowryu hya' ga Pololan. tay 'llaw na Gowryu hya' ga Mkslaq. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ ɣowrju ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, pajwan *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na ɣowrju ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na ɣowrju ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ɣowrju ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ɣowrju ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ɣowrju ħjaʔ ɣa pololan. taj ʔllaw na ɣowrju ħjaʔ ɣa mks~ɕlaq. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
